description: Adds human-readable descriptions and deprecation annotations to the Business Partner OData CSDL without modifying the original $metadata document.

data.Core.Description: Represents a natural or legal person involved in business transactions such as customers, vendors, or internal business units.
data.Core.LongDescription: A Business Partner is the central master data object for customer and vendor management. It consolidates all party information and supports both individual persons and organizations.

Core.Revisions.Description: Use SearchTerm1 instead. This property will be removed in a future API version.

data.Core.Description: Numeric credit score for the business partner. Range: 100 (excellent) to 600 (poor).
